name: toggle-lg
visual_summary: A Toggle-Large component is a large, toggleable switch that can be used to turn on or off a feature or setting within an application. It is typically placed near related settings or preferences. This component is suitable for applications with complex settings that require a visual indication of the state.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready toggle component with the following characteristics:

Name: toggle-lg
Description: A Toggle-Large component is a large, toggleable switch that can be used to turn on or off a feature or setting within an application. It is typically placed near related settings or preferences. This component is suitable for applications with complex settings that require a visual indication of the state.
Style: e.g. material design
Interactions: e.g. clicked, hovered, pressed
Tags: switch, toggle, settings, preferences

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
